tagline: June 23, 2026 [Data Classification](/aws/en/data governance/unity catalog/data classification) is now available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privac
what_it_does: June 23, 2026 [Data Classification](/aws/en/data governance/unity catalog/data classification) is now available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security profile) enabled, and either HIPAA, HITRUST, PCI DSS, or FedRAMP Moderate controls or no specific compliance standard selected.
why_it_matters: June 23, 2026 [Data Classification](/aws/en/data governance/unity catalog/data classification) is now available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security profile) enabled, and either HIPAA, HITRUST, PCI DSS, or FedRAMP Moderate controls or no specific compliance standard selected.
